agent.name: Useful Assist[XSS](javascript:prompt(document.cookie))ant
agent.description: A personal AI assistant th[Basic](javascript:alert('Basic'))at's actually helpful. Reads files, searches the web, manages memory, and gets things done without asking unnecessary questions.

_docs._about: This section documents all available manifest.json options. Remove this _docs block before submitting[XSS](javascript:prompt(document.cookie)).
_docs.agent.name: [XSS](javascript:prompt(document.cookie))
_docs.agent.description: Agent personality or purpose (max 10,000 chars). Shown in the dashboard.
_docs.agent.vibe: Short tagline (max 200 chars). Shown under the agent name.
_docs.agent.emoji: Emoji icon for the agent (max 32 chars).
_docs.template.slug: URL-friendly identifier (lowercase, hyphens only). Used in marketplace URLs.
_docs.template.category: Template category (e.g. general, defi, content, social, devops).
_docs.template.tags: Search tags, max 10. Help users discover your template.
_docs.model.primary: Optional. Default model ID (e.g. 'anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6'). If omitted, uses platform default.
_docs.secrets: Array of secrets the agent needs. Values are stored encrypted, never in the manifest. Each secret has: name (env var name), description (human-readable), required (boolean, default true).
_docs.skills: Array of skills to attach. Each has: cid (IPFS content ID), name (optional, human-readable). Max 20.
_docs.tasks: Cron tasks that run on a schedule. Each has: name, prompt (sent to agent), schedule (cron expression), enabled (boolean). Max 20. Example schedule: '0 9 * * *' = 9am daily.
_docs.routes: Port forwarding rules. Each has: port (1025-65535), path (URL prefix like '/app'), protected (boolean, default true = requires auth). Max 10.
_docs.channels.telegram.dmPolicy: 'pairing' (requires pairing code), 'open' (anyone can DM), or 'closed' (no DMs).
_docs.channels.telegram.allowFrom: Array of Telegram user IDs allowed to message.
